title: PANIC: while trying to `go get github.com/containers/buildah`
body:
```console
$ go get github.com/containers/buildah
panic: internal error: can't find reason for requirement on github.com/mattn/go-colorable@v0.1.12

goroutine 1 [running]:
cmd/go/internal/modget.(*resolver).updateBuildList.func1({{0xc0024041c0, 0x1d}, {0xc001bbb860, 0x7}})
	/usr/local/go/src/cmd/go/internal/modget/get.go:1760 +0xd4
cmd/go/internal/modget.(*resolver).updateBuildList(0xc0008ce000, {0xb45938, 0xc000196010}, {0x0, 0x0, 0x0})
	/usr/local/go/src/cmd/go/internal/modget/get.go:1765 +0x54c
cmd/go/internal/modget.(*resolver).applyUpgrades(0xc0008ce000, {0xb45938, 0xc000196010}, {0x0?, 0x0, 0xc00019fd70?})
	/usr/local/go/src/cmd/go/internal/modget/get.go:1312 +0x465
cmd/go/internal/modget.runGet({0xb45938, 0xc000196010}, 0xc0001be4e0?, {0xc000194170, 0x1, 0x1})
	/usr/local/go/src/cmd/go/internal/modget/get.go:351 +0x458
main.invoke(0xe5c320, {0xc000194160, 0x2, 0x2})
	/usr/local/go/src/cmd/go/main.go:225 +0x3d9
main.main()
	/usr/local/go/src/cmd/go/main.go:179 +0x7ce
```
